# femtech-radar

> Agent-first FemTech intelligence: an MCP server that fetches, dedupes, and scores women's-health & FemTech research and industry news, designed to feed GitHub Agentic Workflows and an auto-updating Astro + RSS site.

This file follows the [llms.txt](https://llmstxt.org/) convention: a concise, machine-readable map
of the project for large language models and AI agents.

## About

- Repository: https://github.com/ChanMeng666/femtech-radar
- Primary stack: Node.js / JavaScript
- License: MIT

## Key documents

- [README](https://github.com/ChanMeng666/femtech-radar/blob/feat/v1-mcp-server/README.md): overview, features, installation, usage
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/ChanMeng666/femtech-radar/blob/feat/v1-mcp-server/AGENTS.md): how AI agents should work in this repo
- [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/ChanMeng666/femtech-radar/blob/feat/v1-mcp-server/CONTRIBUTING.md): development setup and contribution workflow
- [CHANGELOG](https://github.com/ChanMeng666/femtech-radar/blob/feat/v1-mcp-server/CHANGELOG.md): version history

## For agents

To work effectively here: read the README and AGENTS.md first, then follow the commands and
conventions they describe. Prefer the project's own scripts over ad-hoc commands.
